summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Electricity: Magnetic and Heating Effects in science.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 8 science explains the core concepts of Electricity: Magnetic and Heating Effects. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
